title: lastrea viscosa
intro: Lastrea viscosa, also known as the sticky fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The health benefits of Lastrea viscosa include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in many Asian cultures. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
